evals.prompt: Create a fullstack course for a beginner who wants Nuxt.js + Hono.js, 16 weeks, 10 hours per week, and AI-driven development enabled. Include chapter lessons, page-by-page content, exercises, assignments, and 7 projects.
evals.expected_output: Includes complete intake handling, dependency-ordered foundations-first curriculum, AI workflow chapter, minimum exercises and assignments, and fullstack project count with at least one realtime project and societal usefulness.

evals.prompt: Build a backend course for Go + Fiber for someone transitioning from frontend. Duration is 12 weeks, 8 hours weekly. Must emphasize UML, ERD, DB design, and system design before advanced APIs.
evals.expected_output: Starts from internet and architecture fundamentals, includes backend-first sequencing, terminology explanations, devops basics, and at least 3 backend projects.

evals.prompt: Generate a frontend course using TypeScript and Nuxt.js for a total beginner in 10 weeks at 6 hours/week. Keep explanations simple enough for a 10-year-old and include 4 practical projects.
evals.expected_output: Teaches HTML-CSS-JS-TypeScript-Nuxt in order, uses simple analogies, includes minimum practice requirements, and delivers at least 4 frontend projects.
